description: Generate a phylogenetic tree to visualize the evolutionary relationships between the 8 species (Human, Chicken, Bread Mold, Hemp, Yeast, Fruit Fly, Horse, and Pig) using the cytochrome c protein FASTA file at ~/UGENE_Data/cytochrome_c_multispecies.fasta. The tree should be constructed using the MUSCLE algorithm for multiple sequence alignment and the built-in phylogenetic tree builder. Save the resulting tree in Newick format to ~/UGENE_Data/results/cytochrome_c_tree.nwk.

metadata.data_source: UniProt cytochrome c sequences (P99999, P67881, P00048, P00053, P00044, P04657, P00004, P62895)
